archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) tailored for Developer Tools
design_philosophy: IDE-meets-Dashboard. Deep void black backgrounds, stark high-contrast typography, and a single electric accent color to focus attention. UI should feel like a command center: dense, precise, and unobstructed by decorative elements.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-medium hover:bg-[#00B8CC] transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm

cards.style: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 rounded-sm p-4 relative overflow-hidden group

sidebar.style: w-64 bg-[#0A0A0A] border-r border-white/10 flex flex-col h-screen

inputs.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-sm text-white focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] transition-all px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-white/30

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Avoid heavy glassmorphism for this domain. Use solid, opaque layers (#121212) with crisp 1px borders to maintain an IDE/Terminal aesthetic.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use subtle drop-shadows on active graph nodes or primary CTAs. drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)]
visual_enhancers.grid_background: For the Knowledge Graph and Architecture Viewer, use an SVG dot pattern background (fill-white/5) to represent a canvas.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Fast, crisp transitions (duration-150 ease-out). Changes in border opacity rather than background color.
motion_and_interactions.graph_interactions: When hovering over a node, dim all non-connected nodes to opacity-30. Highlight connected edges with the active accent color (#00E5FF).

icons_and_assets.logo_strategy: Use react-icons (FaGithub, FcGoogle) for OAuth and repository connections instead of raster images.

media.description: Abstract 3D network structure for auth screen background or empty states

testing_attributes.instruction: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., `data-testid="repo-upload-button"`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark mode IDE aesthetic. Do not use generic light gray backgrounds.

For the Knowledge Graph (React Flow), use the custom colors defined in `knowledge_graph` to ensure readability. Disable default edge rendering and use custom bezier curves with dimming logic on hover.
Install `lucide-react` for standard UI icons and `react-icons` for brand logos (Google, GitHub).
Use Shadcn UI components but override their default `rounded-md` classes to `rounded-sm` or `rounded-none` for a sharper, more technical look.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard. Use explicit borders (`border-white/10`) to separate sections instead of soft shadows.
Ensure the Chat Interface features streaming text with `JetBrains Mono` for code blocks, maintaining syntax highlighting contrast.
